body.title: Research corpus: adaptive organizer knowledge base
body.result: Subsumed by reading-pipeline + annotate_learning work (closed 2026-04-19 audit). annotate_learning() tool + PROC_ANNOTATE_LEARNING habit (aa5c9dbf) deposit EXPERIENTIAL nodes on 'this worked' / 'this didn't' signals. RL_016-020 reading list entries (7 Habits, GTD, ADHD 2.0, Drive, Atomic Habits) extend the knowledge corpus via book_learner extraction → cortex. The adaptive organizer knowledge base is the graph itself, populated by the reading pipeline.
body.description: GitHub issue #252. Imported from GH audit — needs triage.
